verses.1: A Song of Ascents, of David. LORD, my heart is not proud, nor my eyes arrogant; Nor do I involve myself in great matters, Or in things too difficult for me.
verses.2: I have certainly soothed and quieted my soul; Like a weaned child resting against his mother, My soul within me is like a weaned child.
verses.3: Israel, wait for the LORD From this time on and forever.
